finding: Most 'deep questions' (Q1,Q2,Q13,Q14) converge on ONE structure — frequency/hub dominance — exactly the information-theoretic core that survived Phase Ξ. A small set is genuinely structural and distinct (Q3 person frame, Q7/Q8 relational, Q9 name-independence, Q11 aspect). Q5/Q6/Q10 are blocked (semantics/external).
